content_body:
Dear Owners, 

Thank you for sharing your beautiful cabin! We came up here to celebrate our 20th anniversary. What a great place to do that! We explored Blue Ridge, went hiking, and completed two puzzles! We went whitewater rafting and ziplining too. We really enjoyed our evenings here, cooking dinner, sitting in the rockers, and taking in that view! We can't wait to bring the kids here! We will definitely stay again! 

Thanks! ~ The Kellys
title: Celebrating Our 20th Anniversary At Bella Vista Lodge!
